title: RNA-seq Differential Expression Pipeline
question: Which transcriptomic programs drive chemotherapy resistance in GEA?
dataset_target: TCGA-STAD via recount3 / GDC (RNA-seq counts + clinical)
dataset_actual_poc: Van't Veer et al. 2002 Nature 415:530, n=198, 78 probes, via sksurv.datasets.load_breast_cancer
substitution_reason: TCGA-STAD via recount3/GDC not reachable from reproducibility sandbox
status: Runnable POC; full pipeline is a target that needs TCGA access
reproduce_command: pip install scikit-survival pandas numpy scipy matplotlib && python scripts/poc/run_poc.py

headline_result.er_signature_caveat: Training-fold validation of pipeline; signature derived from same samples it scores

limitations: POC is breast cancer (Van't Veer), not GEA — pipeline validation only
Small N and probe count (198 samples, 78 probes)
ER signature AUC is training-fold, not held-out
No external pathway databases used (MSigDB / Enrichr unreachable)
Full TCGA-STAD pipeline cannot be run in the sandbox
role: Biological framing, dataset selection, DEG plausibility review against known GEA biology. Implementation AI-assisted.
